SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: READMISSIONS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 6 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: All hospital stays during the year, including readmissions, are counted in the ACUTE_STAYS variable. 

Similarly, all acute hospital inpatient payments including payments for readmissions are included in the 
ACUTE_* payment variables.
